headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录289篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究191篇, 开源项目56篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（68篇）。其中11%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ mvanhorn /last30days-skill：AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - th

▸ RyanCodrai /turbovec：A vector index built on TurboQuant, written in Rust with Python bindings

▸ google /skills：Agent Skills for Google products and technologies

▸ Panniantong /Agent-Reach：Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, 

▸ danielmiessler /Personal_AI_Infrastructure：Agentic AI Infrastructure for magnifying HUMAN capabilities.
text: 今日共收录289篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究191篇, 开源项目56篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（68篇）。其中11%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
